text:
Quen City (, Kūen-shi) is a city within the Republic of Rokario. 

Overview

The city of Quen is one of the three cities that's closest to the border of the NGL. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Quen City's location appears on Killua's Beatle-07 map. 

Trivia

The name of the city is transliterated as Qwen City in Crunchyroll's version/translation.

Translations around the World

References
